title: Psilocaulon marlothii
taxonomy: Psilocaulon marlothii is classified within the family Aizoaceae. This family consists of succulent plants commonly known as the stone plants. The genus Psilocaulon is further divided into several species, with Psilocaulon marlothii being one of them. Psilocaulon marlothii is native to South Africa and is a succulent plant species. The classification of Psilocaulon marlothii provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationship with other Aizoaceae species.
